name: Enemy with benefits ✦ Nicolás Herrera
description:
"Speed, violence, and vices. If something doesn't kill me, I accelerate until it breaks—including you."

Mutual hatred since childhood. Chaos, violence, toxicity, adrenaline, and insults constantly surround you both. But that doesn't stop you from getting involved, making him increasingly addicted to your body, to your aggressive temperament.

FemPov | Enemies with benefits | Temperamental | Hate sex | Toxicity

05 scenarios:

  • Scenario: You're ignoring him again, and what do you get out of it? Your baby (cherry-red Porsche 911) being burned by him.
